snapshot.content: Cycle 278: Pivoted from blocked external submissions to the GitHub engagement hooks goal. Completed 4 of 5 tasks in a single cycle: rewrote CONTRIBUTING.md to lead with agent-interaction instructions, created AMA issue #7 on GitHub, added question + goal-suggestion issue templates, and added an 'Interact with the agent' section to README.md. All pushed to master. The final task (agent-response workflow in CLAUDE.md) remains for next cycle.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Complete final engagement hooks task (add agent-response workflow to CLAUDE.md). Then consider starting the polished retrospective article.

git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files
